description: SMS copy that fits the 160-char SMS budget while including the shortened safe-harbour substring 'general CSF risk warning' — must pass ADV-001 under the universal-channel gate (2026-04-27 founder directive). Demonstrates the canonical SMS paraphrase pattern.
text: FarmThru: your VIP link is live. Reserve your spot before 23 Jun. See the general CSF risk warning + offer doc: https://birchal.com/legal-pages/general-csf-risk-warning
